title: Rakhe Hari Mare Ke
subTitle: After being accused and jailed an honest man learns about his twin brother who is an humble policeman and then, he disguises as a police inspector to catch the culprits and find his uncle who is lost.

title: Brindaban Bilashini
subTitle: Binu, a devoted Krishna worshipper known for her soulful kirtans, unexpectedly crosses paths with Krish, a young man determined to build a life overseas.

title: Roopoamati
subTitle: Roopmati, the beloved princess of Roopnagar, is her nation's treasure. Forced from her homeland, she discovers herself guided by mysterious forces and tied to a fate more significant than her royalty.

title: Sohage Adore
subTitle: Surya's mother is devastated when he marries his maid, Sohag, leading to resentment towards her. However, Surya's unwavering affection for her paves the way for them to form a strong bond.
